title: Architecture
content_html:
Architecture

This section describes the current site building blocks and runtime boundaries.

Use this section for:

  • public route structure
  • generated artifact flow into runtime pages
  • shared shell behavior
  • cross-page runtime ordering rules
  • how the current JSON-led catalogue workflow feeds those runtime surfaces

References

  • Knowledge System Vision for the cross-system purpose of Studio, Analytics, Docs Viewer, Data Sharing, semantic tokens, and the hybrid Analysis scope
  • Source Tree Ownership for the maintained boundary between Studio source, Docs Viewer source, public source, generated output, and local working output
  • Data Flow for which generated artifacts each public route reads at runtime
  • Site Shell Runtime for the shared shell, scope split, and docs-viewer shell boundary
  • Sorting Architecture for canonical ordering across generated artifacts and runtime pages
  • Docs Viewer Runtime Boundary for the guardrail on when docs scopes should and should not fork the shared viewer runtime
  • Scoped JSON Catalogue Build for the live rebuild path that refreshes the main runtime JSON artifacts used by public catalogue pages
